argument.script: (async () => { const res = await fetch('https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/' + encodeURIComponent('{{ word }}')); const data = await res.json(); if (!data || !data[0]) return []; const item = data[0]; const phonetic = item.phonetic || (item.phonetics && item.phonetics.find(p => p.text)?.text) || ''; const type = (item.meanings && item.meanings[0] && item.meanings[0].partOfSpeech) || 'N/A'; const definition = (item.meanings && item.meanings[0] && item.meanings[0].definitions && item.meanings[0].definitions[0] && item.meanings[0].definitions[0].definition) || 'No definition found'; return [{ word: item.word, phonetic, type, definition }]; })()

description: Search the Free Dictionary API for definitions, parts of speech, and pronunciations
name: Search
